events.text: Assessment complete: this is a **fail** — 29 CFR 1926.651(c)(2) requires a ladder/ramp/stairway within 25 ft of lateral travel for anyone in a trench, and none is present. Risk rated **high** due to the emergency-egress hazard. Details written to `/app/answer.json`.
